_source: Tutt ANJ et al. NEJM 2021;384:2394 (OlympiA adjuvant); Robson M et al. NEJM 2017;377:523 (OlympiAD metastatic); SmPC Lynparza

Instructions.Name: olaparib
Instructions.Inst: 300 mg (2×150 mg) p.o. 2× denne — ráno a večer (12h rozostupy). Indikácia: gBRCA1/2+ HER2-. Adjuvant: 12 mesiacov. Redukcia pri GFR 31-50: 250 mg 2×/deň.
